title: Broadcast Desk Update 002: B-Roll Collection
summary: Students review B-roll collection expectations and submit evidence for the B-Roll Sequence pilot project.
studentInstructions: Review the B-roll collection checklist, capture or organize the required shots, and submit the finished evidence or link.
submissionRequirements: B-roll sequence file or hosted link
teacherNotes: Use this update to test how Broadcast Desk posts can point students into a specific video production project and submission workflow.
